primary_subject: Zhuangzi's butterfly dream / paper lantern on still black lake

image_requests.prompt: Overhead-angled cinematic shot of a solitary glowing paper lantern adrift on an obsidian-black lake at night, mist hovering two feet above the water surface. The warm amber light from the lantern projects upward into the mist, and the shadow it casts — impossibly, beautifully — is the unmistakable outline of a butterfly in flight, wings spread wide, sharp and clear in the vapor. Everything else is absolute stillness. The lake has zero ripple. Mountains are ghost-shapes in the far distance. Color palette: warm lantern amber, ice-white mist, pitch black water. Minimal composition — one object, one impossible shadow. Ultra-cinematic, dreamlike realism. No people, no text.
image_requests.purpose: Full-bleed hero background — the locked visual metaphor of Zhuangzi's paradox: a lantern floating on a black still lake casts a perfect butterfly silhouette into the mist above it

image_requests.prompt: A lone robed Taoist sage standing beneath a gnarled ancient pine on a misty mountain path at deep night, lit by cold silver moonlight from above, ink-wash painting style, cinematic atmosphere, vertical composition showing the full figure from head to foot, extremely dark background, deep shadows, color palette of pale silver moonlight against near-black ink and deep indigo mist. Mysterious, meditative, otherworldly. Very dark background is essential — figure is lighter than surroundings. No text.
image_requests.purpose: Ghostly left-side figure blend — Zhuangzi himself as an ethereal presence, screened over the dark water using mix-blend-mode so his moonlit robes glow at the waterline without competing with the lantern

html:
STILL
DREAMING
why: The lantern/butterfly shadow image fills every pixel as the hero — it's the one image in the world that shows Zhuangzi's paradox rather than describing it: an impossible butterfly shadow cast by a lantern on a still black lake is the dream-logic made visible. The robed figure is blended in screen mode on the left, masked so it dissolves rightward into the black water like a thought dissolving into sleep — this fulfills the required figure without cluttering the central metaphor. 'STILL' floats at the top in ultra-light tracked Cormorant (the lightest whisper of a word) and 'DREAMING' anchors the bottom at 212px bold (the thing that cannot be escaped), creating a typographic bookend so the viewer reads the paradox — STILL… [visual pause] …DREAMING — in exactly the order the video delivers it. The amber glow text-shadows marry the lantern warmth to the white typography, unifying image and text into one visual temperature.
title: (NO ADS) The Way of Zhuangzi — Calm Taoist Sleep Stories for Deep Rest
